'''kafoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelotypia|zelotypia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelotypia|zelotypia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kafoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæfeyeth|kæfeyeth]] || [[word:kæfeyej|kæfeyej]] || [[word:kæfeyesh|kæfeyesh]] || [[word:kæfeye|kæfeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kafofoyoth|kafofoyoth]] || [[word:kafofoyoj|kafofoyoj]] || [[word:kafofoyosh|kafofoyosh]] || [[word:kafofoyo|kafofoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kafoyoth|kafoyoth]] || [[word:kafoyoj|kafoyoj]] || [[word:kafoyosh|kafoyosh]] || [[word:kafoyo|kafoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kafofyofth|kafofyofth]] || [[word:kafofyofj|kafofyofj]] || [[word:kafofyofsh|kafofyofsh]] || [[word:kafofyof|kafofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kafoyotho|kafoyotho]] || [[word:kafoyojo|kafoyojo]] || [[word:kafoyosho|kafoyosho]] || [[word:kafoyoko|kafoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kafoyoth|kafoyoth]] || [[word:kafoyoj|kafoyoj]] || [[word:kafoyosh|kafoyosh]] || [[word:kafoyo|kafoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kafoyothol|kafoyothol]] || [[word:kafoyojol|kafoyojol]] || [[word:kafoyoshol|kafoyoshol]] || [[word:kafoyokol|kafoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kafoyoothotho|kafoyoothotho]] || [[word:kafoyoojojo|kafoyoojojo]] || [[word:kafoyooshosho|kafoyooshosho]] || [[word:kafoyooko|kafoyooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kafoyothon|kafoyothon]] || [[word:kafoyojon|kafoyojon]] || [[word:kafoyoshon|kafoyoshon]] || [[word:kafoyokon|kafoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kafoyothooro|kafoyothooro]] || [[word:kafoyojooro|kafoyojooro]] || [[word:kafoyoshooro|kafoyoshooro]] || [[word:kafoyokooro|kafoyokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
